What could a shift in Intel’s foundry strategy bring? Investing.com -- Intel’s mooted plan to push key foundry work from its coming 18A manufacturing node to a later 14A process would not meaningfully affect earnings over the next two years, Morgan Stanley said, saying expectations for the original programme were already modest.
